cy.contains.description: Assert that the page or an element contains the given text.

cy.get.description: Locate a DOM element by selector for further interaction.

cy.url.description: Read or assert the current browser URL.

cy.runQueueWorker.description: Drain the queue worker to flush publish-and-sync events.

cy.wait.description: Pause execution until an element, alias, or timeout resolves.

cy.visit.description: Open a storefront URL in the browser.

cy.window.description: Access the browser window object of the current page.

cy.visitBackoffice.description: Open a Backoffice URL in the browser.

cy.wrap.description: Wrap a plain value into a chainable subject for assertions.

cy.request.description: Send an HTTP API request and capture the response.

cy.runCliCommands.description: Run one or more CLI/console commands against the environment.

cy.location.description: Read a part of the current URL (pathname, hash, search).

cy.intercept.description: Stub or spy on a network request matching a route.

cy.log.description: Emit a message to the test log.
